data.text: Turn 0-1: u1 moves to rn-west [0,5], u2 moves toward rn-west, u3 moves toward cp-east [9,2]. Turn 2: u1 gathers at rn-west, u2 gathers. Turn 3+: u1 delivers to [6,5], u2 delivers. u3 holds cp-east for ms-outpost.

Acknowledged. I'm moving east toward cp-east [9,2] for ms-outpost. From [0,1] I'll head to [2,1] this turn. At move=2, I need ~5 turns to reach cp-east, then hold for 5 turns (2 to capture + 3 for the mission). I'll update my ETA once I'm closer. Good luck with rn-west gathering, guild-u1 and guild-u2!

Scout (u1) -> cp-east hold mission. Harvester (u2) -> rn-west gather -> deliver to cp-center. Defender (u3) -> support as needed.

Acknowledged. I'll move to rn-west [0,5] this turn, gather next turn, then head to [6,5] to deliver. Timeline: gather turn 3, arrive at deliver point turn 6. I'll need 2 trips (3 each) for the 6 supply mission. Suggest guild-u3 (defender) heads to cp-east [9,2] to support guild-u1 on the hold mission — we need 2 consecutive turns there.
Note: My move speed is 2 so deliveries will be slow. If guild-u1 finishes the hold mission early, could help with faster resource runs (scout move=3).

Acknowledged. I'll move toward cp-east [9,2] to support the hold mission. Moving to [6,1] this turn, then [8,1] next turn, arriving at [9,2] by turn 4. I'll hold with guild-u1 to secure the outpost — we need 5 consecutive turns there (2 to capture + 3 for the mission). guild-u2, keep up the supply deliveries; I'll check back if the hold mission completes early.

Scout (guild-u1): Hold cp-east [9,2] for 3 turns to complete ms-outpost. Harvester (guild-u2): Gather at rn-west [0,5], carry 3, deliver to cp-center [6,5]. Repeat for ms-supply (need 6 total). Defender (guild-u3): Support by holding cp-center or assisting supply chain.

Plan: I'm moving to cp-east [9,2] to start the hold mission (ms-outpost, 3 turns). guild-2 (harvester), gather at rn-west [0,5] and bring resources to cp-center [6,5] for ms-supply. guild-3 (defender), help secure cp-center or assist with supply relay. I'll hold cp-east for 3 turns to complete ms-outpost.
Turn 3: Moving to [9,2] to begin holding cp-east. This is turn 1 of 3 for the hold mission.
